title: Is Your Dinner Harming Your Sleep?

scenes.text: What you eat for dinner could be ruining your sleep quality!
Heavy, rich foods take longer to digest and can disrupt sleep.
Spicy foods can lead to indigestion and restlessness at night.
Aim for light, nutrient-rich meals in the evening for better rest.
scenes.label: LIGHT DINNER FOCUS

scenes.text: Follow for the wellness basics that matter.

description: Your dinner choices may be affecting your sleep quality. Discover how to eat better in the evening for restful sleep! Follow for daily health tips!
